_note: Swiss VAT rates in force since 2024-01-01. Source: ESTV / AFC.

normal.scope: default rate, most goods and services

reduced.scope: food, books, newspapers, medicines (art. 25 al. 2 LTVA)

lodging.scope: hotel and lodging services with breakfast (art. 25 al. 4 LTVA)

exempt.scope: exports, financial services, healthcare, education (art. 21 LTVA)
